title: AuthResponse
description: Authentication response sent by the station to the app via BLE characteristic FFF4 (Notify). Indicates whether the authentication handshake was accepted or rejected.

sessionKeyConfirmation.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256(sessionKey, "AuthResponse_OK") (exactly 44 chars), present when result is Accepted (06-security.md §6.5).

durationSeconds.description: Advisory copy of the authorized service duration for app UX (finding N3). UNSIGNED — relayed by the station from the SIGNED ServerSignedAuth claims (Partial A) or the AuthorizeOfflinePass response (Partial B). The station's clamp enforcement is rooted in the SIGNED durationSeconds (server-signed-auth-claims.schema.json), NOT this advisory field. MAY be present when result is Accepted.

creditsAuthorized.description: Advisory copy of the authorized credit budget for app UX (finding N3). UNSIGNED — see durationSeconds. MAY be present when result is Accepted.

reason.description: Human-readable rejection reason code, present when result is Rejected

errorCode.description: Numeric error code, present when result is Rejected
